eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Medina, TX; at 7:27 PM on JUN 15, 2026 Effective until 7:27 PM JUN 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Medina County Precinct 1 is setting up barricades along FM 471 due to rising waters. Avoid this area and tune to local weather and the National Weather Service www.weather.gov
